description: v0.4 M1b — mac-arm64 baseline placeholder. First-run collection mode until a green macos-14 Apple Silicon run lands; then repin via `--update-baseline`. Note: AArch64 codegen lacks -march=x86-64-v3 equivalent; native primitives rely on -mcpu=apple-m1 (Clang default on macos-14) + NEON intrinsics. MoltenVK wraps Vulkan→Metal so Vulkan reduction order may differ by ≤2 ULP from linux+NVIDIA — see ParityConfig.platformTolerance(triple).

runner.note: GitHub Actions macos-14 Apple Silicon M1. First-pin after M1 lands. MoltenVK translates SPIR-V to Metal — reductions may have different rounding vs GPU SPIR-V directly.

primitives.name: normalize_soa6_64k
primitives.note: Apple Silicon unified memory helps bandwidth-bound work; expect Java-ref ~25-32 ns. Initial budget conservative.

primitives.name: apply_wind_bias_64k
primitives.note: Clang -mcpu=apple-m1 NEON codegen. Native floor off until first-pin.
